skills.name: company-investigation
skills.description: Pre-meeting company research — paste a company URL and get a scannable HTML report with source credibility badges across 10 research dimensions. Use this skill whenever someone wants to research a company before a meeting, sales call, interview, or investment decision — or asks about a company's funding, competitors, leadership, tech stack, or business model. Trigger even when the user does not explicitly say investigate — if they're trying to learn about a specific company, this skill applies. Invoke with /investigate followed by a URL, or natural language like: research Acme Corp, or I have a meeting with Notion tomorrow.
